content: I am a URC Postdoctoral Fellow at HKU Business School, The University of Hong Kong, and received my Ph.D. in Finance from Sun Yat-sen University. My work has been published in Financial Review, Technological Forecasting and Social Change, Business Strategy and the Environment, etc. I serve as an Assistant Editor of International Review of Finance, the flagship journal of the Asian Finance Association. I have received Job Market Star, 25th China Economics Annual Conference; Sun Yat-sen University President’s Scholarship; National Scholarship for Doctoral Students; and National Scholarship for Master’s Students. My research has received China Excellent Young Scholar Paper Award in Finance; Top-Ranked Paper, 13th Guangdong Provincial Award for Excellence in Financial Research; “Outstanding Paper Award” at the 22nd Conference on Financial Systems Engineering and Risk Management (FSERM); and several conference outstanding paper awards.

title: Cunyi YANG 杨存奕
